condition_summary: Required columns exist for each point table per tables/mt_point_tables_schema.csv
Required fields populated within allowed NaN semantics per FM02
Row counts and keys align across layers per FM03
No duplicate file_id row_index within a table per FM04
Joins use immutable keys not floating T or H equality per FM05
Clean outputs traceable to raw identity rows per FM06
Smooth channel never substitutes for clean truth without explicit method flag per FM07
Derived rows must not depend on hidden raw-only reads violating isolation per FM08
time_s versus time_rel_s semantics explicit before time-based slopes per FM09
segment fields treated as annotation layer per FM10
Each emitted observable records source_columns aggregation_method definition per FM11

applies_to_observable_name_patterns: abs(H_Oe)>H_ABS_GT_EPS_Oe for every contributing row in M/H and chi_mass summaries
sample_mass_g finite positive and provenance-checked per file or sample policy
segment_type not UNKNOWN where required segment_source trusted per segmentation policy
ZFC and FCW (and FCC when used) T supports overlap at least policy fraction
Increasing and decreasing segments share overlapping T window at least policy fraction
Versioned derivative policy artifact approved and run-scoped flag DERIVATIVE_POLICY_APPROVED=YES
N_points in aggregation scope meets or exceeds N_min published in run config
time_quality_class not BLOCKER for file and MT_TIME_AXIS_BLOCKER_PRESENT=NO at run scope when derivative uses temperature ordering
